What I handle

One person, the parts of a shipment you can't see from far away.

/ 01

FOB nominated forwarder

Name me as your forwarder in China. I coordinate your supplier, the booking, export customs and documents, and keep you updated in your time zone.

/ 02

FCL ocean freight

Full-container shipping from any major port in South, East and North China. Space booked, rates kept honest, no surprise origin charges.

/ 03

Door delivery · DDP / DAP

With our own offices at destination, I can take your cargo all the way to the door in Vietnam and Iraq, customs included.

The two lanes I know best

I ship two corridors well, instead of pretending to do everything everywhere.

CN → VN

China to Vietnam

Hai Phong and Ho Chi Minh (Cat Lai), with sailings that usually arrive in under a week. Full-container loads, FOB nominee handling, and door delivery through our Vietnam office. Most weeks I'm moving small appliances and project cargo on this lane — tell me what you're buying and from where, and I'll tell you the cleanest way to ship it.

  • Main ports Hai Phong · Ho Chi Minh (Cat Lai)
  • Transit Under 1 week
  • Modes FCL · FOB nominee · DDP / DAP
CN → IQ

China to Iraq

Umm Qasr is the destination; in today's conditions almost everything routes through a Gulf transshipment hub — Khor Fakkan, Sohar or Fujairah — before the final leg. That extra step is exactly where shipments get stuck, so it's where I pay the most attention: I keep the transshipment moving and tell you the truth about timing. Door delivery is available through our Iraq office.

  • Destination Umm Qasr
  • Transship via Khor Fakkan · Sohar · Fujairah
  • Transit Up to ~6 weeks
  • Modes FCL · FOB nominee · DDP / DAP
  • Note Most carriers don't accept dangerous goods on this lane right now.
Who you'll be talking to

You reach me — not a call center.

I'm Bob Law, an ocean freight forwarder based in the Pearl River Delta in South China. I work the two lanes I know best — China to Vietnam and China to Iraq — instead of claiming to cover the whole world.

When you message me, you get me. I look after the parts of a shipment an overseas buyer can't see from far away: the supplier, the port, the paperwork, the transshipment. Most of the job is noticing problems early and telling you the truth about them.

Outside work I photograph the places I walk through — nearly every image on this page is mine. I think the same habit of paying attention is what makes someone good at this work.
